name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 policies/month, missed renewals cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and managing policy renewals and expirations.
